intent: A small FastAPI auth service. Endpoints under /api/auth/* — POST /api/auth/login and POST /api/auth/register. Returns JWT-shaped JSON, no real persistence.
features: POST /api/auth/login accepts email + password, returns token
POST /api/auth/register accepts email + password, returns token
notes: Modular layout: app/api/auth.py defines the router under prefix '/api'; main.py mounts it on the FastAPI app. ONE prefix declaration is required — picking it on the router OR on include_router(), not both.
